title: Alaska + World Skeleton
description: OpenTopoMap raster tiles. World skeleton z=0-5 (every tile globally) + Alaska statewide z=6-10 (lon -180..-130, lat 51..72). Includes the Aleutian chain.

source.name: OpenTopoMap
source.attribution: Map data © OpenStreetMap contributors, SRTM | Map style: © OpenTopoMap (CC-BY-SA)

notes: v1: pack is bundled inside the app. v2+ will host regional packs in iCloud Drive and ship only the world skeleton in the binary.
